mapper.select: SELECT w.warehouse_id AS warehouseId, (w.warehouse_space - IFNULL(SUM(a.area_space), 0)) AS remainSpace FROM warehouse_table w LEFT JOIN area_table a ON w.warehouse_id = a.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_space;

SELECT remainSpace FROM ( SELECT w.warehouse_id AS warehouseId, (w.warehouse_space - IFNULL(SUM(a.area_space), 0)) AS remainSpace FROM warehouse_table w LEFT JOIN area_table a ON w.warehouse_id = a.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_space ) AS sub WHERE warehouseId = #{warehouseId}

select a.area_id as areaId, a.area_space - ifnull(sum(s.stock_amount * p.product_size), 0) as remainSpace from area_table a left join stock_table s ON a.area_id = s.area_id left join product p ON s.product_id = p.product_id group by a.area_id;
SELECT area_id as areaId, area_space as areaSpace, area_code as areaCode, area_price as areaPrice, warehouse_id as warehouseId, storage_id as storageId FROM area_table
SELECT storage_id AS storageId, storage_name AS storageName, min_temp AS minTemp, max_temp AS maxTemp, description FROM storage_condition
